pageHero.heading: About Us
pageHero.intro: Welcome to Elevate Mental Health and Wellness. We provide compassionate, evidence-based psychiatric care for children, adolescents, adults, and families.
paragraphs: We understand that your mental health is a deeply personal, integral part of your overall well-being. Elevate was born out of a simple promise: to provide psychiatric care that is highly personalized, deeply collaborative, culturally sensitive, and entirely free of judgment. We honor your unique background, identity, and lived experiences. By combining clinical excellence with active behavioral management and tailored support, we walk alongside you to navigate life's challenges, unearth your innate resilience, and help your entire family truly thrive.

mission.heading: Our Mission
columns: Our mission is to provide comprehensive, high-quality, and evidence-based psychiatric care that empowers individuals and families on their journey toward mental wellness. While we safely and skillfully manage symptoms through thoughtful medication management, we are fierce advocates of behavioral therapy and hands-on guidance.

We believe that the best outcomes are achieved together. True, lasting success relies on a strong team approach, whether that means partnering with adults to take charge of their wellness, collaborating with loved ones and care systems for older adults, or equipping parents with the practical tools and guidance needed to support their child's growth.

founder.heading: Care that meets you where you are.
founder.paragraph: Rohzan G. Altre is a board-certified psychiatric nurse practitioner licensed in California and Nevada. She works with children, teens, and adults facing ADHD, anxiety, depression, bipolar disorder, PTSD, and autism-related behavioral challenges.
founder.blockquote: I believe people do best when they feel safe enough to be honest about what they are going through. My job is to listen closely, explain your options clearly, and help you find a path that actually works for your life.

items.title: Compassionate Collaboration
items.description: We view you and your loved ones as active, respected partners in the treatment process. Your goals always shape your care plan.

items.title: Culturally Sensitive Care
items.description: We approach your care with cultural humility, ensuring our treatment plans honor and respect your unique background and values.

items.title: Balanced Treatment
items.description: Medication is a powerful tool to stabilize the mind, but we pair it with behavioral management to ensure therapeutic skills truly take root.

items.title: Behavioral Management and Parent Teaching
items.description: We provide actionable behavioral strategies supporting parents to navigate childhood challenges and helping adults manage stress and life transitions.

items.title: Absolute Integrity and Privacy
items.description: We maintain the highest ethical standards, utilizing a fully secure, HIPAA-compliant electronic medical records portal to protect your privacy.

items.title: Empowerment and Growth
items.description: Our ultimate goal is to give you the practical tools and clinical insights needed to navigate life with confidence and long-term resilience.

partner.heading: Partner With Us
partner.text: A compassionate space to heal, grow, and elevate your life.

testimonials.heading: What patients are saying about Elevate

items.quote: Any psychiatrist can write a prescription and you're done. Rohzan goes the extra mile. That is how she has been helping me, and she has saved my life with proper diagnoses, treatment, and advice.
items.author: Alfred

items.quote: I can't say enough about my great experience with Rohzan. She helped me through the hardest time in my life. I highly recommend her to anyone facing a challenging situation. Just take one day at a time.
items.author: Denise

items.quote: She's a psych NP who shows genuine empathy and professionalism, which helped me open up to her comfortably. She's awesome!
items.author: Calvin

items.quote: Rohzan listens without judgment and explains every step of treatment clearly. I finally feel understood and supported in my mental health journey.
items.author: Darren

items.quote: Virtual appointments made it easy to stay consistent with care. The whole experience felt personal, professional, and genuinely caring.
items.author: Maria

items.quote: After years of struggling, I found a provider who took time to understand my full story. Elevate has been life-changing for our family.
items.author: James

items.quote: Compassionate, knowledgeable, and responsive. Rohzan helped me build a plan that actually works for my day to day life.
items.author: Priya

items.quote: I appreciate how thorough and patient she is. Every session leaves me feeling heard and hopeful about the path forward.
items.author: Michael

items.quote: Elevate Mental Health and Wellness truly lives up to its name. The care is thoughtful, warm, and effective.
items.author: Sandra

footer.description: Individualized psychiatric care and brief psychotherapy for patients in California and Nevada.
